title: CodeGrind: Cyberpunk City Map Upgrades & AI Assistant Enhancements
summary: Showcase the latest CodeGrind updates: cyberpunk city map improvements, AI assistant upgrades, and streamlined workflow features that boost problem-solving and navigation.
core_message: CodeGrind continues to evolve with a cyberpunk city map refresh, improved AI-assisted problem solving via Azure OpenAI, and a clearer engagement workflow. Expect smoother navigation, richer visuals, and smarter in-editor guidance that helps users learn DS&A more effectively.
cta: Explore the updated CodeGrind experience and try AI-assisted problem solving today.
visual_brief: Static hero-style image: a neon-lit city map UI overlaid with highlighted problem nodes, AI assistant chat panel on the side, subtle cyberspace glow, CodeGrind branding.

media.selection_reason: No public blob assets were available, so the workflow will generate a review image from the brief.
